scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws IllegalArgumentException when child is null
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = null;

scenarios.description: append first child when childNodes is initially empty (ensureChildNodes branch-true)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is parent; parent.childNodeSize() == 1; child.parent() == parent; child.siblingIndex == 0
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node child = new TextNode("text");
assert result == parent; assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert child.parent() == parent; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;

scenarios.description: append second child when childNodes already non-empty (ensureChildNodes branch-false)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is parent; parent.childNodeSize() == 2; secondChild.parent() == parent; secondChild.siblingIndex == 1
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); Node first = new TextNode("one"); parent.appendChild(first); Node second = new TextNode("two");
assert result == parent; assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert second.parent() == parent; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1;
